Install S.A.G.E
0
 
Headings that you add to the document will appear here.
 
Important: this tool is compliant with Curso, Claude, Git Copilot, VSCode and others.
STEP 1 - Check github and ssh configuration
How do I know if I have GitHub access and SSH configured?
1) Generate a new SSH key
2) Add the key to the SSH agent
3) Link the key to your GitHub account
4) Test the connection
STEP 2 - Clone/Pull SAGE
